items.title: Service tasks have explicit stage semantics
items.description: Task orchestration no longer relies on daily_sync implicitly rebuilding the full world; service execution is split into sync, screener, and backtest stages.

items.title: Daily backtest is a queue-backed service task
items.description: Backend exposes a dedicated daily_backtest service trigger and the service worker can consume it to rebuild deterministic backtest artifacts.

items.title: Scheduler runs the pipeline in order
items.description: The scheduler CLI can enqueue and execute the daily pipeline in the intended order, and queue ids preserve chronological processing order.

items.title: Orchestration keeps deterministic baseline after verification
items.description: Init, smoke, and scheduler verification complete without leaving extra task or backtest rows behind in the dev DuckDB baseline.
